title: BorderShrink
description: BorderShrink is a plugin that allows you to teleport all players to a random location and have the world border slowly close in on you.
body:
# BorderShrink
![Screen shot of border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c34d599f8aa444bd1b8ca010b67dcade731776c9.png)

Border shrink is a spigot plugin that allows all players to get teleported some where random and have the border slowly shrink

## Features
- Customizable barrier size
- Customizable barrier speed
- Auto clear inventory on start
- Set players gamemode to spectator on death
- No need for world regeneration every time

## Commands
### Description
- bordermin: set the border size that the border will shrink to
- bordermax: set the border size that the border will start as
- borderspeed: set the borders shrink speed in secounds (how long it will take to shrink)
- borderstart: starts the round
- borderstop: stops the round

### Syntax
- bordermin: /bordermin <MinimumBlocks>
- bordermax: /bordermax <MaximumBlocks>
- borderspeed: /borderspeed <SpeedInSecounds>
- borderstart: /borderstart
- borderstop: /borderstop

## Notes
- You do not need to run borderstop to run border start it just stops the border early

## Other
- If you have any questions or recommendations just send me an email at nat1234fly@gmail.com and i might add it

## Update Notes
### v1.1:
- Fixed bug with hunger not being restored
- Fixed bug with health not being restored
- Added reseting saturation on start
